---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for HabibiChill
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like. -->

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? How does it benefit users? -->

## 📖 Islamic Basis (if applicable)
<!-- If this feature relates to Islamic content, please provide references:
- Quranic verse (surah:ayah) with link to quran.com
- Hadith with source, narrator, and link to sunnah.com
-->

## 🖼️ Design Ideas
<!-- If you have design ideas or mockups, include them here. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered? -->

## 📋 Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or examples from other apps. -->

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What would "done" look like for this feature? -->
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Works on mobile
- [ ] Works in dark mode
